02 — About

WHO I AM

Hi, I'm Debroop. Pull up a chair.

I grew up skipping cricket matches and Bollywood films to watch Anime and Cartoon Network — and to obsess over Fevicol, Cadbury, and Coca-Cola ads. Not because I loved brands. Because I loved how they made a connect with Indian people. That instinct turned into a career.

Over 8 years, I've worked at the crossroads of culture, storytelling, and strategy — building IPs that reshaped content platforms, launching films, collaborating with governments, and creating campaigns that connected with real people and delivered real results.

Beyond the briefs and decks, I'm someone who makes cocktails, loves Anime, hunts for good music, appreciates mural art, travels whenever possible, and is genuinely excited about what AI is doing to creativity. This portfolio is a journal of that journey — not just the wins, but the thinking behind them.

Currently Open To Creative Director roles · Brand collaborations · Consulting

🤖
AI & TECH

04 — Case Studies

WORK THAT HIT

MASHABLE
MORNINGSFLAGSHIP IP
Original IP · Mashable India
Mashable Mornings
60 MN+ VIEWS
The Brief
Build a show that captures the human side of Indian entrepreneurship beyond Shark Tank.
The Insight
Audiences don't want just success stories — they want struggle, honesty, and the hustle behind the pitch.
The Idea
A bi-weekly IP pairing intimate conversations with CEOs and founders with a drive through their city — uncovering how the places they live shaped the businesses they built. Featured Nikhil Kamath, Vineeta Singh, Ankur Warikoo, Ghazal Alagh and more.
The Impact
60M+ views. Brand collaborations with Mercedes-Benz and Coworks. Expanded into the Middle East.

CREATORS
JAMHERO CASE
Branded Content · Samsung × Jaipur Lit Fest
Creators Jam — Galaxy Tab S9
50 MN+ VIEWS
The Brief
Establish Samsung Galaxy Tab S9 as the go-to creative tool for artists.
The Insight
Today's creators thrive on collaboration where expression meets interaction — they need a device that empowers this synergy.
The Idea
Partnered with Jaipur Literature Fest to launch "Creators Jam" — a 5-day multi-sensory art installation where two artists jammed live daily using the Galaxy Tab S9. Genre-themed days: horror, AR, fantasy, fashion, and time travel. Featured Santanu Hazarika, Archana Kochhar, Neelesh Misra and more.
The Impact
50M+ views. S-Pen, AI tools and 3D editing showcased through 10 artists in real-time collaborative creation.
02
Branded Content · Mashable India
Innovation Powered by You
5.3 MN+ VIEWS
5-part series humanising Accenture's commitment to sustainability through innovators across India.
03
Branded Content · Fork Studios

Creator-led Road Trip

Franklin Templeton UAE

Branded Content · Digital Strategy
ELLITE 50 Most Influential Indians
NYC · Statue of Liberty

VATIKA
VOICESGOLD MENA AWARD
Influencer Campaign · Vatika Arabia × Curly Tales Dubai
Vatika Voices
5.2 MN+ VIEWS · GOLD MENA
The Brief
Position Vatika as a trusted partner in the growth journey of women across the Middle East.
The Insight
In a region rapidly redefining gender roles, women seek not just inspiration but tangible paths to progress.
The Idea
A regional call-out generated 4,000+ submissions; 1,000 women shortlisted. A 4-day bootcamp with 25+ hours of mentoring across business, marketing, finance. A 22-episode video series featuring leading Emirati women. A community microsite for ongoing learning.
The Impact
5.2M+ views · 400K+ meaningful engagements · Gold at Digital MENA Awards · Season 2 launched in 2022.
02
Influencer · Saudi Tourism × Curly Tales ME
Our Saudi
10 MN+ VIEWS
Kamiya Jani paired with local hosts across Riyadh, Abha, AlUla and Jeddah to discover Saudi's hidden gems.
03
Influencer · MP Tourism × Curly Tales
MP Ki Galliyon Mein
10-Part Series
Siddharth Allambayan explores MP through locals — artisans, food vendors, historians across Ujjain, Ratlam, Orchha.
DURGOTSAVSCREENXX WINNER
Social Media Campaign · Bingo Tedhe Medhe
Durgotsav
Best Use of Social Media by a Brand
The Brief
Create culturally resonant social engagement for Bingo Tedhe Medhe during Durga Puja.
The Insight
Durga Puja isn't just a festival — it's a cultural identity. Brands that lean in authentically win hearts, not just eyeballs.
The Idea
A social-first campaign that blended the energy of Durgotsav with Bingo's playful brand personality — creating culturally connected content that drove mass engagement.
The Impact
SCREENXX Award Winner — Best Use of Social Media by a Brand.
02
Social Media · MOJ App × Mashable India
The Creators' Room
Content Series
Decoded the creative process of MOJ's top creators in a long-form branded series on Mashable India.
03
Social Media · Nick Jr. India
Nick Jr. IP Launches
Motu Patlu · Chikoo Bunty · Bhoot Bandhus
Social media launch strategy for Nick Jr.'s flagship IPs — growing community organically.
04
Social Media · EVA Live
EVA Live Community
Organic Growth Strategy
Built and grew EVA Live's digital community from the ground up through organic social content.
INDIA
IN MOTIONGOVERNMENT OF INDIA
Government Collab · Doordarshan × Curly Tales India
India In Motion
3.7 MN+ VIEWS
The Brief
Showcase India's transformation across road, rail, and air infrastructure.
The Insight
Mobility is more than progress — it's the driving force behind India's next chapter of growth.
The Idea
A 3-part video series for the Government of India, hosted by Kamiya Jani — Railways, Roadways, Airways. From Vande Bharat trains to smart expressways to the UDAN scheme connecting smaller towns by air.
The Impact
3.7M+ views. Positioned mobility as a catalyst for India's economic growth and regional connectivity.

DD National + Jio Cinemas
A series on India's rich history and culture. Aired on DD National and Jio Cinemas. Shared by PM, Home Minister & Railway Minister.

MICKEY
17VIRAL LAUNCH
Film Launch · Warner Bros. India × TheSmallBigIdea
Mickey 17
VIRAL PREMIERE ACTIVATION
The Brief
Create engagement at the premiere of Mickey 17 across movie theatres in India.
The Insight
Mickey 17's existential sci-fi premise — a disposable worker who keeps being reborn — mirrors everyday office burnout perfectly.
The Idea
A meme-led campaign drawing parallels with office burnout culture. A "Mickey takeover" at the premiere with masked guests sparked reel-worthy moments and viral social engagement.
The Impact
Viral engagement across social platforms. Premiere activation became a content moment in itself.
02
Film · Warner Bros. India
Final Destination Bloodlines
Digital Launch
Digital launch strategy for Warner Bros. India's Final Destination Bloodlines.
03
Film · Warner Bros. India
Minecraft Movie
Social Campaign
Social-first film launch campaign for Minecraft, Warner Bros. India.

Experiential · Warner Bros. India
Comic Con Bangalore
On-Ground Activation
Experiential activation at Comic Con Bangalore — bringing Warner Bros. IPs to life.

07 — Skills

HOW I THINK

I don't just make content. I build systems that make brands mean something. Here's how I approach the work that matters.

🧭
Brand Strategy
"A brand without a point of view is just a logo."
Long-term brand planning, positioning, identity building. I work backwards from culture to strategy — not the other way around.
🎬
Creative Direction
"The best brief is a feeling, not a document."
End-to-end creative direction across video, digital, social and experiential. I lead with instinct, refine with insight.
📺
IP & Platform Building
"The shows people keep coming back to aren't made for brands — they're made for people."
Original IP development and content platform strategy. Built shows that outlived their campaign budgets.
📱
Social & Community
"Virality is a side effect of relevance, not a goal."
Platform-native content, community strategy, influencer and creator collaborations across India and the Middle East.
🤝
Business & Pitches
"A pitch isn't a presentation. It's a conversation starter."
New business development, pitch leadership, white-label solutions and retainer management across categories.
🤖
AI & Creative Ops
"AI doesn't replace the idea. It just gets you to the bad ones faster."
AI-driven workflows, data-led storytelling, trend spotting and GenAI solutions for content at scale.
